item.title: Ditch the Comfort Zone
item.description: You have to get out of your comfort zone to achieve something. You must have heard or read this line many times in books or some random youtube videos. The sense of this line is very simple and true. We have to leave our comfort zone, to move ahead in our life. But how many of us really do it. Some of us try and succeed. Some try for a bit but come back to their comfort zone as soon as they face hard challenge or something that needs some extra work.

item.title: Instant Motivation a New Drug
item.description: These days wherever you look, you can find articles, blogs, videos, vlogs about motivation. That will try to motivate you to achieve your goals. When you read a blog or watch a motivational video, you feel better about yourself and start thinking that you can do it. You can achieve it. But what after that. What happens the next hour or the next day. Do you really start working on your dreams to achieve it OR you just come back looking for that sweet candy of motivation.
